children.name: hwVrrpExtLearnAdvIntervalFlag
children.description:
A switch decides whether the system learn VRRP packet advertisement interval or not,
         which is sended from the master router in one virtual router standby. The default value is enable.

children.name: hwVrrpExtSendV3AdverPktMode
children.description:
This value specifies the mode of sending advertisement packet for VRRP v3.It has three 
         configurable value: VRRP_PROTO_V3_SEND_V2_ONLY(1), VRRP_PROTO_V3_SEND_V3_ONLY(2) and
         VRRP_PROTO_V3_SEND_V3V2_BOTH(3).

children.name: hwVrrpTrackBfdTable
children.description: The VRRP tracking BFD table, it can append eight rows at most.

children.name: hwVrrpTrackInterTable
children.description: The VRRP tracking interface table, it can accomodate eight rows at most.

children.name: hwVrrpTrackInterEntry
children.description: An entry in the VRRP tracking interface table.

children.name: hwVrrpTrackInterPriReduce
children.description:
If the tracked interface is down, priority of standby will reduce this value. '0' 
                                 specifies this attribute hasn't been configured. The minimum availability value is '1'.

children.name: hwVrrpTriggerRouteEntry
children.description: An entry in the VRRP trigger route table.

children.name: hwVrrpTriggerRouteIfIndex
children.description: The index of the table, it identifies vrrp's interface index.
